---
title: "Data"
execute:
  enabled: true
---

This page describes the datasets available in the `data/` directory. Datasets are organised into tabular (CSV), spatial vector (GeoPackage), and raster (GeoTIFF) files.

## Downloading the data

Run the code chunk below once to download all course datasets into a local `data/` directory. Files that already exist are skipped.

```{r}
#| eval: false
options(timeout = 300)  # large files may need extra time

base_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jmburgos/TCMSAR26/main/data"

files <- c(
  # Tabular
  "datras_2018_haul.csv",
  "datras_2018_length.csv",
  "is_smb_biological.csv",
  "is_smb_stations.csv",
  "minke.csv",
  "small_vms.csv",
  "smb_summary.csv",
  # Spatial vector
  "helcom.gpkg",
  "ice_lines.gpkg",
  "ice_points.gpkg",
  "ice_polygon.gpkg",
  "iceland_coastline.gpkg",
  "iceland_contours.gpkg",
  "ices_ecoregions.gpkg",
  "ices_rectangles.gpkg",
  "nephrops_fu.gpkg",
  "ospar.gpkg",
  "OSPAR_intensity_Otter_2015.gpkg",
  # Rasters
  "Iceland_btemp.tif",
  "Faroes_minbtemp.tif",
  "Iceland_currentsp.tif",
  "Iceland_maxbtemp.tif",
  "Iceland_minbtemp.tif",
  "nephrops.tif",
  "Iceland_depth.tif"
)

dir.create("data", showWarnings = FALSE)

for (f in files) {
  dest <- file.path("data", f)
  if (!file.exists(dest)) {
    message("Downloading ", f, " ...")
    download.file(paste(base_url, f, sep = "/"), destfile = dest, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE)
  } else {
    message("Skipping ", f, " (already exists)")
  }
}

message("Done.")
```

## Tabular data

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `datras_2018_haul.csv`

**Description:** Haul-level data from the DATRAS trawl survey database for 2018, covering multiple European surveys (e.g. BITS, IBTS). Each row represents a single tow with associated metadata on gear, position, environmental conditions, and data quality.

Read with: `read_csv("data/datras_2018_haul.csv")`

Rows: 3,145 \| Columns: 62

| Variable | Type | Description |
|----|----|----|
| id | chr | Unique haul identifier (concatenation of survey, year, quarter, country, ship, gear, stno, haulno) |
| survey | chr | Survey name (e.g. "BITS", "IBTS") |
| quarter | dbl | Quarter of the year (1–4) |
| country | chr | Country code of the vessel |
| ship | chr | Vessel identifier |
| gear | chr | Gear type code |
| sweeplngt | dbl | Sweep length (m) |
| gearexp | chr | Gear experience code |
| doortype | chr | Type of trawl door |
| stno | chr | Station number |
| haulno | dbl | Haul number within station |
| year | dbl | Year of survey |
| month | dbl | Month of survey |
| day | dbl | Day of survey |
| timeshot | time | Time the gear was shot |
| stratum | chr | Stratum identifier |
| hauldur | dbl | Haul duration (minutes) |
| daynight | chr | Whether tow was during day or night |
| shootlat | dbl | Latitude at gear deployment |
| shootlong | dbl | Longitude at gear deployment |
| haullat | dbl | Latitude at gear retrieval |
| haullong | dbl | Longitude at gear retrieval |
| statrec | chr | ICES statistical rectangle |
| depth | dbl | Bottom depth (m) |
| haulval | chr | Haul validity code |
| hydrostno | chr | Hydrographic station number |
| stdspecreccode | dbl | Standard species recording code |
| bycspecreccode | dbl | Bycatch species recording code |
| datatype | dbl | Data type code |
| netopening | dbl | Net opening height (m) |
| rigging | chr | Rigging details |
| tickler | dbl | Tickler chain indicator |
| distance | dbl | Distance towed (nautical miles) |
| warplngt | dbl | Warp length (m) |
| warpdia | dbl | Warp diameter (mm) |
| warpden | dbl | Warp density |
| doorsurface | dbl | Door surface area (m²) |
| doorwgt | dbl | Door weight (kg) |
| doorspread | dbl | Door spread (m) |
| wingspread | dbl | Wing spread (m) |
| buoyancy | dbl | Buoyancy (kg) |
| kitedim | dbl | Kite dimension |
| wgtgroundrope | dbl | Groundrope weight (kg) |
| towdir | dbl | Tow direction (degrees) |
| groundspeed | dbl | Speed over ground (knots) |
| speedwater | dbl | Speed through water (knots) |
| surcurdir | dbl | Surface current direction (degrees) |
| surcurspeed | dbl | Surface current speed (knots) |
| botcurdir | dbl | Bottom current direction (degrees) |
| botcurspeed | dbl | Bottom current speed (knots) |
| winddir | dbl | Wind direction (degrees) |
| windspeed | dbl | Wind speed (m/s) |
| swelldir | dbl | Swell direction (degrees) |
| swellheight | dbl | Swell height (m) |
| surtemp | dbl | Surface temperature (°C) |
| bottemp | dbl | Bottom temperature (°C) |
| sursal | dbl | Surface salinity |
| botsal | dbl | Bottom salinity |
| thermocline | chr | Thermocline presence indicator |
| thclinedepth | dbl | Thermocline depth (m) |
| dateofcalculation | dbl | Date of calculation (numeric) |
| datetime | dttm | Datetime of the haul |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `datras_2018_length.csv`

**Description:** Length-frequency data linked to the 2018 DATRAS hauls. Each row represents a species–length class observed in a haul, with raw and raised counts. Join to `datras_2018_haul` via `id`.

Read with: `read_csv("data/datras_2018_length.csv")`

Rows: 490,564 \| Columns: 6

| Variable | Type | Description                                              |
|----------|------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| id       | chr  | Haul identifier; links to `datras_2018_haul`             |
| latin    | chr  | Latin (scientific) species name                          |
| sex      | chr  | Sex of fish (may be NA for unsexed records)              |
| length   | dbl  | Length class (mm)                                        |
| n.raw    | dbl  | Raw count (number of fish measured in that length class) |
| n        | dbl  | Raised count (estimated total number in the tow)         |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `minke.csv`

**Description:** Biological measurements from minke whale (*Balaenoptera acutorostrata*) caught during Icelandic research/commercial hunts. Contains individual-level data on morphometrics, age, maturity, and stomach contents.

Read with: `read_csv("data/minke.csv")`

Rows: 190 \| Columns: 13

| Variable       | Type | Description                                 |
|----------------|------|---------------------------------------------|
| id             | dbl  | Unique whale identifier                     |
| date           | dttm | Date and time of catch                      |
| lon            | dbl  | Longitude of catch position                 |
| lat            | dbl  | Latitude of catch position                  |
| area           | chr  | Named area of catch (e.g. "North", "South") |
| length         | dbl  | Body length (cm)                            |
| weight         | dbl  | Body weight (kg); many NAs                  |
| age            | dbl  | Estimated age (years)                       |
| sex            | chr  | Sex ("Female" / "Male")                     |
| maturity       | chr  | Maturity status (e.g. "pregnant", "mature") |
| stomach.volume | dbl  | Stomach content volume (litres)             |
| stomach.weight | dbl  | Stomach content weight (kg)                 |
| year           | dbl  | Year of catch                               |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `small_vms.csv`

**Description:** A small subset of Vessel Monitoring System (VMS) positions, likely from a single vessel or fishing trip near Iceland. Each row is a VMS ping with position and vessel ID.

Read with: `read_csv("data/small_vms.csv")`

Rows: 1,070 \| Columns: 3

| Variable | Type | Description           |
|----------|------|-----------------------|
| id       | dbl  | Vessel identifier     |
| lon      | dbl  | Longitude of VMS ping |
| lat      | dbl  | Latitude of VMS ping  |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `is_smb_stations.csv`

**Description:** Station-level metadata for the Icelandic Spring Bottom Trawl Survey (SMB), covering surveys from 1990 onwards. Each row is one tow, with full positional, environmental, and operational detail.

Read with: `read_csv("data/is_smb_stations.csv")`

Rows: 19,846 \| Columns: 28

| Variable | Type | Description |
|----|----|----|
| id | dbl | Unique station/tow identifier; links to `is_smb_biological` |
| date | date | Date of the tow |
| year | dbl | Year of survey |
| vid | dbl | Vessel identifier |
| tow_id | chr | Composite tow identifier |
| t1 | dttm | Start time of tow |
| t2 | dttm | End time of tow |
| lon1 | dbl | Longitude at start of tow |
| lat1 | dbl | Latitude at start of tow |
| lon2 | dbl | Longitude at end of tow |
| lat2 | dbl | Latitude at end of tow |
| ir | chr | ICES rectangle code |
| ir_lon | dbl | Longitude of ICES rectangle centroid |
| ir_lat | dbl | Latitude of ICES rectangle centroid |
| z1 | dbl | Bottom depth at start of tow (m) |
| z2 | dbl | Bottom depth at end of tow (m) |
| temp_s | dbl | Surface temperature (°C) |
| temp_b | dbl | Bottom temperature (°C) |
| speed | dbl | Towing speed (knots) |
| duration | dbl | Tow duration (minutes) |
| towlength | dbl | Tow distance (nautical miles) |
| horizontal | dbl | Horizontal net opening (m) |
| verical | dbl | Vertical net opening (m) |
| wind | dbl | Wind speed |
| wind_direction | dbl | Wind direction (degrees) |
| bormicon | dbl | Bormicon stratum code |
| oldstrata | dbl | Old survey stratum code |
| newstrata | dbl | New survey stratum code |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `is_smb_biological.csv`

**Description:** Species-level catch data from the Icelandic SMB survey, in long format. Each row is a species recorded at a station with total weight and number. Join to `is_smb_stations` via `id`.

Read with: `read_csv("data/is_smb_biological.csv")`

Rows: 68,834 \| Columns: 4

| Variable | Type | Description                                         |
|----------|------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| id       | dbl  | Station identifier; links to `is_smb_stations`      |
| species  | chr  | Common English species name (e.g. "cod", "haddock") |
| kg       | dbl  | Total catch weight (kg)                             |
| n        | dbl  | Total number of fish caught                         |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `smb_utbrteg.csv`

**Description:** Raw Icelandic SMB trawl survey data with original Icelandic variable names. Used as input to generate `smb_summary.csv`. Contains tow-level catch totals for key commercial species.

Read with: `read_csv("data/smb_utbrteg.csv")`

| Variable       | Type | Description                |
|----------------|------|----------------------------|
| ar             | dbl  | Year (Icelandic: *ár*)     |
| reitur         | dbl  | ICES statistical square    |
| tog_nr         | dbl  | Tow number                 |
| lon1           | dbl  | Longitude at start of tow  |
| lat1           | dbl  | Latitude at start of tow   |
| togtimi        | dbl  | Tow duration (minutes)     |
| torskur_kg     | dbl  | Cod catch weight (kg)      |
| torskur_stk    | dbl  | Cod catch number           |
| ufsi_kg        | dbl  | Saithe catch weight (kg)   |
| ufsi_stk       | dbl  | Saithe catch number        |
| ysa_kg         | dbl  | Haddock catch weight (kg)  |
| ysa_stk        | dbl  | Haddock catch number       |
| hrognkelsi_kg  | dbl  | Lumpfish catch weight (kg) |
| hrognkelsi_stk | dbl  | Lumpfish catch number      |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `smb_summary.csv`

**Description:** Processed version of `smb_utbrteg.csv` with English variable names, ICES rectangle centroid coordinates added, and a tidy structure. Covers tow-level catch summaries for cod, saithe, haddock, and lumpfish.

Read with: `read_csv("data/smb_summary.csv")`

Rows: 21,582 \| Columns: 18

| Variable    | Type | Description                          |
|-------------|------|--------------------------------------|
| year        | dbl  | Year of survey                       |
| sq          | dbl  | ICES statistical square number       |
| tow_nr      | dbl  | Tow number within square             |
| lon1        | dbl  | Longitude at start of tow            |
| lat1        | dbl  | Latitude at start of tow             |
| lon2        | dbl  | Longitude at end of tow              |
| lat2        | dbl  | Latitude at end of tow               |
| ir_lon      | dbl  | Longitude of ICES rectangle centroid |
| ir_lat      | dbl  | Latitude of ICES rectangle centroid  |
| towtime     | dbl  | Tow duration (minutes)               |
| cod_kg      | dbl  | Cod catch weight (kg)                |
| cod_n       | dbl  | Cod catch number                     |
| saithe_kg   | dbl  | Saithe catch weight (kg)             |
| saithe_n    | dbl  | Saithe catch number                  |
| haddock_kg  | dbl  | Haddock catch weight (kg)            |
| haddock_n   | dbl  | Haddock catch number                 |
| lumpfish_kg | dbl  | Lumpfish catch weight (kg)           |
| lumpfish_n  | dbl  | Lumpfish catch number                |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Spatial vector data

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `helcom.gpkg`

**Description:** HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) sub-basin polygons for the Baltic Sea, used for regional classification and reporting.

Read with: `read_sf("data/helcom.gpkg")`

Features: 17 \| Geometry: MULTIPOLYGON \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable   | Type | Description                                         |
|------------|------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| objectid   | dbl  | Internal object identifier                          |
| sb_code    | int  | Sub-basin numeric code                              |
| name       | chr  | Sub-basin name (e.g. "Kattegat", "Gulf of Finland") |
| areakm2    | dbl  | Area in km² (may be 0 for some features)            |
| helcom_id  | chr  | HELCOM unique identifier (e.g. "SEA-001")           |
| shape_star | dbl  | Shape start area attribute                          |
| shape_stle | dbl  | Shape start-to-end length attribute                 |
| shape_leng | dbl  | Perimeter length                                    |
| shape_area | dbl  | Polygon area (internal units)                       |
| geom       | geom | MULTIPOLYGON geometry                               |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `ice_lines.gpkg`

**Description:** Line geometries representing ice edges or boundaries, stored in a projected coordinate system. Likely used as reference overlays in map exercises.

Read with: `read_sf("data/ice_lines.gpkg")`

Features: 3 \| Geometry: LINESTRING \| CRS: Unnamed projected CRS (LAEA-like, units: m)

| Variable | Type | Description         |
|----------|------|---------------------|
| geom     | geom | LINESTRING geometry |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `ice_points.gpkg`

**Description:** Point geometries associated with ice observations or reference locations.

Read with: `read_sf("data/ice_points.gpkg")`

Features: 5 \| Geometry: POINT \| CRS: Unnamed projected CRS (units: m)

| Variable | Type | Description    |
|----------|------|----------------|
| geom     | geom | POINT geometry |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `ice_polygon.gpkg`

**Description:** Polygon geometries representing ice-covered areas.

Read with: `read_sf("data/ice_polygon.gpkg")`

Features: 2 \| Geometry: POLYGON \| CRS: Unnamed projected CRS (units: m)

| Variable | Type | Description      |
|----------|------|------------------|
| geom     | geom | POLYGON geometry |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `iceland_coastline.gpkg`

**Description:** Coastline polygon for Iceland, stored in a projected CRS (LAEA). Contains a single feature representing the full Icelandic landmass.

Read with: `read_sf("data/iceland_coastline.gpkg")`

Features: 1 \| Geometry: MULTIPOLYGON \| CRS: Unnamed projected CRS (LAEA, units: m)

| Variable | Type | Description                  |
|----------|------|------------------------------|
| ID_0     | chr  | Country numeric code ("104") |
| NAME_0   | chr  | Country name ("Iceland")     |
| geom     | geom | MULTIPOLYGON geometry        |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `iceland_contours.gpkg`

**Description:** Depth contour lines around Iceland at standard bathymetric levels (-100, -200, -300, -500, -1000, -2000 m). Useful for adding depth reference lines to maps.

Read with: `read_sf("data/iceland_contours.gpkg")`

Features: 6 \| Geometry: MULTILINESTRING \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable | Type | Description                                 |
|----------|------|---------------------------------------------|
| level    | chr  | Depth contour level in metres (e.g. "-200") |
| geom     | geom | MULTILINESTRING geometry                    |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `ices_ecoregions.gpkg`

**Description:** ICES ecoregion polygons covering the North Atlantic and adjacent seas, used for fish stock assessment reporting areas.

Read with: `read_sf("data/ices_ecoregions.gpkg")`

Features: 17 \| Geometry: MULTIPOLYGON \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable  | Type | Description                                             |
|-----------|------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| ecoregion | chr  | Ecoregion name (e.g. "Icelandic Waters", "Barents Sea") |
| area_km2  | dbl  | Ecoregion area (km²)                                    |
| geom      | geom | MULTIPOLYGON geometry                                   |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `ices_rectangles.gpkg`

**Description:** ICES statistical rectangles (0.5° latitude × 1° longitude grid) covering the North Atlantic, used as the standard spatial reporting unit in ICES stock assessments.

Read with: `read_sf("data/ices_rectangles.gpkg")`

Features: 6,758 \| Geometry: POLYGON \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable    | Type | Description                              |
|-------------|------|------------------------------------------|
| id          | dbl  | Internal identifier                      |
| icesname    | chr  | ICES rectangle name (e.g. "47A0")        |
| south       | dbl  | Southern boundary latitude               |
| west        | dbl  | Western boundary longitude               |
| north       | dbl  | Northern boundary latitude               |
| east        | dbl  | Eastern boundary longitude               |
| area_km2    | int  | Rectangle area (km²)                     |
| objectid    | dbl  | Additional object identifier             |
| icesname_1  | chr  | Duplicate of icesname (join artifact)    |
| ecoregion   | chr  | ICES ecoregion the rectangle belongs to  |
| area        | dbl  | Fraction of rectangle area               |
| percentage  | dbl  | Percentage of rectangle within ecoregion |
| objectid_1  | dbl  | Additional join artifact identifier      |
| icesname_2  | chr  | Second duplicate of icesname             |
| shape_st_ar | dbl  | Shape area attribute                     |
| shape_st_le | dbl  | Shape length attribute                   |
| geom        | geom | POLYGON geometry                         |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `nephrops_fu.gpkg`

**Description:** Nephrops (*Nephrops norvegicus*, Norway lobster) functional unit polygons as defined by ICES, covering the Northeast Atlantic.

Read with: `read_sf("data/nephrops_fu.gpkg")`

Features: 30 \| Geometry: POLYGON \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable | Type | Description                                       |
|----------|------|---------------------------------------------------|
| name     | chr  | Functional unit name (e.g. "Noup", "North Minch") |
| fu       | chr  | Functional unit code number                       |
| geom     | geom | POLYGON geometry                                  |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `OSPAR_intensity_Otter_2015.gpkg`

**Description:** OSPAR 2015 otter trawl fishing intensity data on a 0.05° c-square grid, covering the Northeast Atlantic. Includes swept area ratios (SAR) and effort metrics used in bottom-impact assessments.

Read with: `read_sf("data/OSPAR_intensity_Otter_2015.gpkg")`

Features: 91,190 \| Geometry: POLYGON \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326)

| Variable   | Type | Description                                 |
|------------|------|---------------------------------------------|
| c_square   | chr  | C-square identifier for the 0.05° grid cell |
| mid_lat    | dbl  | Latitude of grid cell centre                |
| mid_lon    | dbl  | Longitude of grid cell centre               |
| SubsurfSAR | dbl  | Subsurface swept area ratio (SAR)           |
| SurfSAR    | dbl  | Surface swept area ratio (SAR)              |
| SurfSA     | dbl  | Surface swept area (km²)                    |
| totweight  | dbl  | Total catch weight (tonnes)                 |
| totvalue   | dbl  | Total catch value                           |
| KWfishingH | dbl  | Kilowatt fishing hours                      |
| FishingH   | dbl  | Fishing hours                               |
| geom       | geom | POLYGON geometry                            |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Raster data

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `Faroes_minbtemp.tif`

**Description:** Minimum bottom temperature raster for the Faroe Islands area. Values in °C. Stored in a LAEA projected coordinate system.

Read with: `rast("data/Faroes_minbtemp.tif")`

Dimensions: 175 rows × 200 cols \| Resolution: 2000 m \| CRS: LAEA (lon_0=-4, lat_0=69) \| Range: -1.23 to 8.91 °C

| Layer           | Description                     |
|-----------------|---------------------------------|
| Faroes_minbtemp | Minimum bottom temperature (°C) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `Iceland_currentsp.tif`

**Description:** Ocean current speed raster for the waters around Iceland. Likely a climatological mean or seasonal average. Values in m/s.

Read with: `rast("data/Iceland_currentsp.tif")`

Dimensions: 300 rows × 1080 cols \| Resolution: \~0.017° \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) \| Range: 0.002 to 0.291 m/s

| Layer             | Description         |
|-------------------|---------------------|
| Iceland_currentsp | Current speed (m/s) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `Iceland_maxbtemp.tif`

**Description:** Maximum bottom temperature raster for Icelandic waters. Values in °C. Stored in a LAEA projected coordinate system matching `Iceland_minbtemp.tif`.

Read with: `rast("data/Iceland_maxbtemp.tif")`

Dimensions: 340 rows × 375 cols \| Resolution: 2000 m \| CRS: LAEA (lon_0=-4, lat_0=69) \| Range: -0.99 to 9.82 °C

| Layer            | Description                     |
|------------------|---------------------------------|
| Iceland_maxbtemp | Maximum bottom temperature (°C) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `Iceland_minbtemp.tif`

**Description:** Minimum bottom temperature raster for Icelandic waters. Values in °C. Same grid as `Iceland_maxbtemp.tif`; together they represent the seasonal range of bottom temperatures.

Read with: `rast("data/Iceland_minbtemp.tif")`

Dimensions: 340 rows × 375 cols \| Resolution: 2000 m \| CRS: LAEA (lon_0=-4, lat_0=69) \| Range: -1.00 to 8.60 °C

| Layer            | Description                     |
|------------------|---------------------------------|
| Iceland_minbtemp | Minimum bottom temperature (°C) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `nephrops.tif`

**Description:** Raster representing Nephrops (*Nephrops norvegicus*) distribution or habitat quality around Iceland. Values are integer scores (1–40), possibly a suitability or abundance index.

Read with: `rast("data/nephrops.tif")`

Dimensions: 2401 rows × 8129 cols \| Resolution: \~0.0013° × 0.00065° \| CRS: WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) \| Range: 1 to 40

| Layer    | Description                                      |
|----------|--------------------------------------------------|
| nephrops | Nephrops distribution index (integer score 1–40) |
